title: 2016 Measure B
seo-description: A 30-year, half-cent countywide sales tax to enhance transit, highways, expressways and active transportation (bicycles, pedestrians and complete streets). The measure passed by nearly 72%, the highest level of support for any Santa Clara County transportation tax.
intro-card-title: See how 2016 Measure B has been spent
intro-card-item1: Filter by program categories or grantees
intro-card-item2: Search for a specific project by name
intro-card-item3: Visualize funding in a chart or map
intro-card-item4: Download project data as a PDF or CSV
about-whatismeasureb-text1: A 30-year, half-cent countywide sales tax to enhance transit, highways, expressways and active transportation (bicycles, pedestrians and complete streets). The measure passed by nearly 72%, the highest level of support for any Santa Clara County transportation tax. The
about-whatismeasureb-text3: ensures funds are expended as approved.
about-whatiswebsite-text1: This website is a window into 2016 Measure B revenue and spending. You can search, view and share unaudited financial information about programs and projects, updated quarterly or as new information is released.
about-questions-title: Where can I submit questions or feedback?
filteralert-no-results-title: No funded projects meet these criteria.
filteralert-limited-results-text: Consider broadening your search if you're not seeing enough results. Select a broader date range or choose additional categories, grantees or projects.
filteralert-numerous-results-text: Consider selecting additional filters to narrow down your results or focus on the information you're interested in.
filter-invalid-filter-alert: You must specify a transaction type
footer-info-text: This website provides unaudited financial information about VTA's 2016 Measure B, updated quarterly or as new information is released.
